title: External Codex Family Report v1
description: Grace-mar derived cluster summary for files matching a selector inside a checked-out codex — WORK receipt only; filesystem heuristics, not doctrinal entailment.

report_id.description: Stable identifier for this report (e.g. hash of inputs + timestamp).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the report was produced.

checkout_relative.description: Checkout root path relative to grace-mar repo root when under repo; otherwise absolute path string.

checkout_absolute.description: Absolute resolved checkout path on the machine that built the report (optional).

target_ref.description: Git ref or working-tree marker for Phase 1c.

value.description: Selector argument (e.g. civilization id or inferred file class).

member_limit.description: Maximum member files enumerated before truncation.

truncated.description: True if member enumeration hit member_limit.

member_count.description: Number of member files after truncation (same as len(members)).

members.description: Cluster member files with structural connection counts within the cluster.

title.description: First markdown H1 line when present.

civilization.description: Path-derived civilization folder token when inferable.

connection_count.description: Count of other cluster members that are structural peers (same-directory / parent-directory sweep).

dominant_civilizations.description: Frequency table for civilization path tokens (non-authoritative).

suggested_entry_points.description: Top paths by (-connection_count, path) with mechanical reasons.

most_connected_members.description: Optional duplicate view of highly connected members (same sort as suggested_entry_points when present).
